channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump says talks continuing, Iran says it stepped away
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Appeals court blocks removal of transgender troops, allows recruit restrictions
item.description: An appeals court upheld a ruling that prevents the Pentagon from discharging current transgender service members.

item.title: WATCH: No Doubt performs at the Las Vegas Sphere
item.description: "GMA" offers a behind-the-scenes look at No Doubt's first Las Vegas residency at Sphere.

item.title: Missing lab worker found dead in New Mexico national forest
item.description: Melissa Casias, an employee at Los Alamos National Laboratory, went missing last year and was found deceased, according to her niece.
